means.contextMeaning: Shows the meaning of the word
means.sentence: ANSWER: It means a machine that codes and rebuilds a voice.

codes.simpleMeaning: Changes into secret signs or numbers
codes.contextMeaning: Changes a voice into special signals
codes.sentence: ANSWER: It means a machine that codes and rebuilds a voice.

rebuilds.contextMeaning: Makes the voice again after changing it
rebuilds.sentence: ANSWER: It means a machine that codes and rebuilds a voice.

why.contextMeaning: Asking the reason it was helpful
why.sentence: QUESTION: Why was the vocoder useful in World War Two?

useful.contextMeaning: Good for helping in that war
useful.sentence: QUESTION: Why was the vocoder useful in World War Two?

make.contextMeaning: To cause important calls to be harder to understand
make.sentence: ANSWER: It helped make important calls harder to understand.

harder.simpleMeaning: More difficult to do or understand
harder.contextMeaning: More difficult for people to understand the calls
harder.sentence: ANSWER: It helped make important calls harder to understand.

liked.contextMeaning: They enjoyed the robot-like voice sound in songs
liked.sentence: ANSWER: They liked the robotic voice sound in songs.

closing.simpleMeaning: The last part at the end
closing.contextMeaning: The final part that asks the last question
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] So how did a phone tool become music?
